title: codereview-pass1: SFN boundary example uses non-normative if-condition and enter_desync()
description: The added pseudocode includes an 'if (delta > MAX_SFN_DELTA || !time_provider_valid...)' and enter_desync() which do not match existing normative text or impls in 09-packets-timing.md or code. Should be pure delta calc example without extra logic. Cross-ref line may need update. Tag as codereview. Parent project-LICHEN-ttam. Discovered during pass1 after doc edit.
close_reason: Fixed non-normative pseudocode in doc edit #2
